Boys.description: Number of 14-year-old boys in each time-spent-in-bed category (≤7.0, 7.5, 8.0, 8.5, 9.0, 9.5, 10.0, >10.0 hours). Same samples as Girls but grouped by gender.

Girls.description: Number of 14-year-old girls in each time-spent-in-bed category (≤7.0, 7.5, 8.0, 8.5, 9.0, 9.5, 10.0, >10.0 hours). Same samples as Boys but grouped by gender.

Time_spent_in_bed.description: Ordered categories of time spent in bed (hours), to which scores (e.g. 1 to 8) are assigned for the Mann-Whitney or Chi-squared test for trend.
